creator: cvelbar@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #6)
Messages from a *crashing* 12.2 setup
Up to now there was nothing in /var/crash

root@dhuri:~ # tail -f /var/log/messages
Nov  2 11:12:40 dhuri ntpd[1226]: ----------------------------------------------------
Nov  2 11:12:40 dhuri ntpd[1226]: ntp-4 is maintained by Network Time Foundation,
Nov  2 11:12:40 dhuri ntpd[1226]: Inc. (NTF), a non-profit 501(c)(3) public-benefit
Nov  2 11:12:40 dhuri ntpd[1226]: corporation.  Support and training for ntp-4 are
Nov  2 11:12:40 dhuri ntpd[1226]: available at https://www.nwtime.org/support
